content.problemStatement:
In this Practice Problem you will create a Student and Locker Assignment System using Django's One-to-One relationship. \
You should have two models: `Student` and `Locker`. Each Student can have only one Locker, and each Locker belongs to only one Student. \
The project and URL mappings have been set up for you.

#### Your Tasks:
#### Complete the models.py file with the two models:
1. Student: 
- Fields:
  - name - Char (max_length=100)
  - roll_number - Char (max_length=20, unique=True)
2. Locker: 
- Fields:
   - student - OneToOne with Student model, on_delete=models.CASCADE)
   - locker_number - Char (max_length=10, unique=True)
   - location = Char (max_length=100)
#### Complete the views.py file:
Complete the code in the `homepage` function to create 2 Locker objects.

After completing the above, click on **RUN** which will run migrations and run the server which will open the homepage and should show the output as follows:
